field_values.action_summary: In a moment of clarity amidst the thinning air, John Carter remembers the nine "thought waves" needed to operate the plant. He strips an air-scout machine of all weight and launches into a high-speed, desperate flight through the dying atmosphere.
field_values.camera_intent: POV shots from the cockpit; Extreme wide shots (scout machine vs. vast sky); Fast-paced tracking shots
movement_notes: Speed and trajectory of the air-scout machine
Visual appearance of thinning atmosphere (sky color/clarity)
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH027_SC004

## Production Intent
The sequence must capture the pivot from atmospheric despair to high-stakes kinetic action. Production must facilitate a transition from the grounded, heavy atmosphere of the Palace/Hangar to a high-speed aerial flight through a thinning Martian sky, requiring precise coordination between cockpit POV shots and wide tracking shots of the scout machine.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Rugged survivor; Martian warrior)

## Required Environments
- The Palace/Hangar
- the Martian sky (thinning)

## Continuity Constraints
- **Machine Dynamics:** Consistent speed and trajectory of the air-scout machine during flight sequences.
- **Atmospheric Visuals:** Strict adherence to the visual appearance of the thinning atmosphere, specifically regarding sky color and clarity.

## Beat List
- BT001: John Carter experiences a moment of clarity amidst the thinning air.
- BT002: Carter remembers the nine "thought waves" required to operate the plant.
- BT003: Carter strips an air-scout machine of all unnecessary weight.
- BT004: Carter launches into a high-speed, desperate flight through the dying atmosphere.
